decisions.what: Implemented complete Prisma schema with PostgreSQL provider
decisions.why: Specification required entities, roadmaps, milestones, and relationships tables with proper indexing and constraints

decisions.what: Used snake_case for database column names with @map directive
decisions.why: Following PostgreSQL conventions while maintaining Python naming standards in the client

decisions.what: Added comprehensive indexes on foreign keys and frequently queried fields
decisions.why: Specification required proper indexing for performance optimization
Ensures referential integrity when parent entities are deleted

decisions.what: Created async database client with connection management
decisions.why: FastAPI requires async support and proper lifecycle management

decisions.what: Implemented health check functionality in client
decisions.why: Enables monitoring and observability for database connection status

decisions.what: Created Pydantic models with comprehensive validation
decisions.why: Specification required proper validation rules and type hints for all entities

decisions.what: Added field validators for enum-like fields (status, priority)
decisions.why: Ensures data integrity at the application level before database insertion

decisions.what: Seeded diverse industry types and maturity levels
decisions.why: Specification required comprehensive testing data across different domains

decisions.what: Created 8 entities, 5 roadmaps, 8 milestones, and 5 relationships
decisions.why: Provides sufficient variety for testing different scenarios and edge cases

decisions.what: Implemented comprehensive test suite with connection, model, and CRUD tests
decisions.why: Specification required tests for database connection, initialization, validation, and operations
Specification explicitly required testing owner-based filtering functionality
